Hello, I'm

Imran Hossen

Masters Research student in CS

University College Dublin

I’m a first-year research masters student at School of Computer Science in University college dublin under the supervision of Prof. Dr. Rob Brennan and Prof. Dr. Gareth Jones. My research focuses on data value calculation for dataset retrieval. Alongside that, I work on neuroimaging, primarily in EEG signal processing.

News

  • Dec 2025 Presented “F2HF: Feed-forward network as a noisy head filter for vision transformer explanation” at 28th ICCIT 2025 in Cox's Bazar, Bangladesh
